title: October 9
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 9''' is the 282nd day of the year (283rd in leap years). There are 83 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1920s#1920|1920]] – [[Jason Wingreen]] is born.
*[[1930s#1934|1934]] – [[Patrick Gleeson]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Guillermo del Toro]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Sam Riegel]] is born.
*[[1996]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 1]] published.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II]]'' released on the PC platform.
*[[2000]] – [[David Dukes]] dies.
*[[2002]] – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 41]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – ''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]'' released.
*[[2009]] – "[[Children of the Force]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 10|''Star Wars'' (2013) 10]] published.
*2013 – ''[[Star Wars: Ewoks—Shadows of Endor]]'' published.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars Rebels Story and Activity Book]]'' published.
*2014 – ''[[Star Wars Rebels 3D Activity Book]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Rebel Rescues]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Allegiance 1|''Allegiance'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle 2|''Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle'' 2]] published.
*2019 – [[Target Vader 4|''Target Vader'' 4]] published.
*2019 – [[Jedi Fallen Order - Dark Temple 3|''Jedi Fallen Order - Dark Temple'' 3]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Ahsoka 4|''Ahsoka'' 4]] published.
*2024 – [[Ewoks (2024) 1|''Ewoks'' (2024) 1]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic Adventures – Dispatches from the Occlusion Zone 1|''The High Republic Adventures – Dispatches from the Occlusion Zone'' 1]] to be published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic Adventures – Echoes of Fear 2|''The High Republic Adventures – Echoes of Fears'' 2]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic Adventures – Saber for Hire 4|''The High Republic Adventures – Saber for Hire'' 4]] published.
*[[2025]] – ''[[The Jaws of Jakku]]'' published.
<noinclude>
